title: This AI Can Read Minds
summary:
A new month means a new issue of InsideAI. And this August, we’re diving into both the good and bad of artificial intelligence.   As we all know, AI has plenty of applications that are changing lives for the better (check the second news story), and some even save lives (like the AI lifeguard!).
